title: Guestbook
description: A site guestbook where any okdohyuk.dev visitor can leave a short message. You can post even without logging in, using a nickname and a deletion password.

openGraph.title: Guestbook
openGraph.description: Feel free to leave a message on the okdohyuk.dev guestbook. Logged-in users post with their account; visitors can join with a nickname and a deletion password.

form.anonymousNotice: A nickname and deletion password are required when not logged in.

delete.confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this?
delete.error: Failed to delete. Please check the password.

report.title: Report
report.descriptionLabel: Please select a reason for reporting.

list.empty: No messages yet. Be the first to leave one!
